title: Rusted
description: Rusted is an immersive modification that expands the copper oxidation mechanic (introduced in vanilla Minecraft) to Iron Blocks. Add realism and depth to your world by watching iron structures and blocks gradually succumb to corrosion, progressing through
body:
# <center>✨ RUSTED MOD ✨
![modpack title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1956eb7066704762c5f68138bac2e460bc5dd683.png)
### Corrosion Takes Hold of Your World
Rusted is a mod that extends the copper oxidation mechanic to iron blocks. Add realism and depth to your world by watching iron structures corrode through four realistic rust states. Your metal structures will never look the same again.

#

### Dynamic Iron Rusting
All Iron Blocks and their variants oxidize over time, passing through four distinct rust stages. This process is synchronized with the game's natural cycle.

### Environmental Impact
Rust doesn't develop evenly. The corrosion process is significantly accelerated when a block comes into contact with water or is exposed to rain, providing a strategic element of structural protection.

### Complete Control Over Maintenance
You have complete control over the rusting process of your buildings:
Use the Honeycomb to apply a layer of wax to any block, permanently stopping the rusting process at that stage. Dewaxing and Scraping: Use the Axe to remove the wax layer. Scrape away the rust layer, restoring the block to its previous, cleaner state.

planned: integration with create mod
